name: Charles Liang
background: Charles Liang founded Supermicro and has served as President, Chief Executive Officer and Chairman of the Board since the company's inception in 1993. He is a pioneer in the development of server technology and has been granted many patents for server technologies.

commpanies.name: Super Micro Computer, Inc.
commpanies.title_or_role: President, Chief Executive Officer and Chairman of the Board
